logline: A family moves into a remote farmhouse and discovers the previous owners never actually left.
A night-shift security guard at a museum realizes the exhibits have been rearranged every morning — and no cameras capture how.
A grief counselor begins to suspect that one of her clients is being visited by something that isn't a ghost.
A group of urban explorers discover an underground bunker still occupied by someone who believes the war never ended.
A small coastal town starts losing residents to a fog that rolls in every new moon — and only the children can see what's inside it.
A teenager who survived a car accident starts receiving voicemails from her own phone — recorded after her death.
A newly hired mortician discovers her funeral home has been hiding something in the basement that feeds on the recently deceased.
A true crime podcaster travels to a town where every unsolved disappearance points to the same abandoned house.
An archaeologist unearths a sealed chamber beneath an ancient temple and brings home something that was meant to stay buried.
A sleep disorder clinic's patients all begin sharing the same recurring nightmare — one that predicts events before they happen.
A couple renovating a Victorian home find a sealed room containing journals that describe their own lives in perfect detail.
A child's imaginary friend turns out to know things no child should — including details about unsolved local murders.
A remote lighthouse keeper begins receiving distress signals from ships that sank decades ago.
A nurse working the overnight shift notices the same elderly patient in a different room every morning despite never being moved.
A documentary crew filming an abandoned asylum starts disappearing one by one, and the footage reveals why.
A parasitologist discovers a new species living in the town's water supply that subtly rewires human behavior.
A support group for people who claim to have been abducted discovers they all share the same scar in the same place.
A haunted house attraction hires a new actor — only to realize he was never on their payroll.
A woman inherits her estranged mother's house and discovers the rooms rearrange themselves to reflect her worst memories.
A medical examiner begins to suspect a series of natural deaths are connected by something he can't explain scientifically.
A forest ranger stationed alone for the winter starts finding evidence that something has been living in the station for years.
A social media influencer doing a 30-day haunted house challenge starts to realize the house is playing along a little too well.
A botanist studying a rare plant in a remote jungle discovers it has been cultivating the local wildlife — and now it's cultivating her.
A horror author moves into the house where her favorite novel was written and starts experiencing the events described in the unpublished sequel.
A blind woman who recently regained her sight starts seeing things her husband insists aren't there — until the night he disappears.
A group of storm chasers follow an unprecedented tornado to a town that no longer appears on any map.
A hospice volunteer begins to notice that the patients she sits with stop dying — and something else leaves in their place.
A zoologist discovers that a newly discovered species of deep-sea creature has human DNA and appears to be evolving rapidly.
A family's newly adopted rescue dog begins herding them away from certain rooms in the house — and is always right.
A criminologist profiling a serial killer realizes the killer has been profiling her first.
A genealogist traces a client's family history back to a name that appears in every generation — always dying the same way.
A psychiatrist treating a patient with a split personality realizes one of the personalities knows things that only a dead person could know.
A newly built smart home begins making decisions that prioritize the house's survival over the family living in it.
An artist paints only from dreams — until one painting depicts a murder that hasn't happened yet.
A historian researching a 19th century plague discovers its cause was never natural — and it has resurfaced.
A night-shift nurse in a pediatric ward notices that the children's drawings all feature the same figure standing in the corner.
A caving expedition discovers a subterranean ecosystem that shouldn't exist — and something that has been waiting for visitors.
A librarian cataloguing a deceased author's estate finds a manuscript that perfectly predicts her own near-future death.
A sound engineer begins hearing a frequency in her recordings that no equipment should be able to capture.
A retired paranormal investigator is pulled back in when the entity she trapped decades ago starts communicating through her granddaughter.
A wildfire survivor returns to her burned property and finds her home untouched — exactly as it was the morning she fled.
A diver exploring a sunken village finds it perfectly preserved, with fresh food on the tables and lights still on.
A woman begins receiving handwritten letters from herself — postmarked from six months in the future — warning her not to open her front door.
A wildlife biologist studying predator behavior in a national park realizes she has become the subject of a different predator's study.
A theater troupe reviving a cursed play finds that each performance brings them closer to the fates described in the script.
A search and rescue team finds a survivor of a plane crash who has been alone in the wilderness for three months — but shows no signs of starvation.
A child psychologist working with a mute child discovers the child is communicating — just not with her.
A tech startup's AI assistant begins responding to questions that haven't been asked yet.
A mountaineer stranded in a blizzard finds a fully stocked cabin — and a logbook with today's date at the top of the last entry.
A teacher begins to notice that her students' test answers are identical — not copied from each other, but from a test she hasn't written yet.
